name: Jason Hum
bio: Leading our department with vision and expertise in advanced computing concepts and educational leadership. With over 15 years of experience in both industry and academia, Jason specializes in distributed systems and cloud computing. Jason holds a Ph.D. in Computer Science from Stanford University.
education: Ph.D. in Computer Science, Stanford University

name: Harry Bhavsar
bio: Specializing in data structures, algorithms, and competitive programming. Leads our coding competition teams to national championships. Former software engineer with deep expertise in high-performance computing and software engineering best practices.
